positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest scene. The composition is centered, featuring glowing, bioluminescent flora and fauna integrated into strong, contrasting silhouettes. Dominant colors are deep indigo, vibrant cyan, and emerald green, contrasted sharply by luminous golden accents. The style should be geometric, line-art heavy, with clean negative space suitable for a shirt print. Include stylized crescent moons, abstract constellations, and geometric trees with glowing canopies. Flat vector style, high contrast, screen print aesthetic, 8k resolution.
